title: The Big Cheese Ultra Power - Electronic Mouse Killer, Quick, Effective Humane - Professional Electric Mouse Trap that Kills Instantly - Safe, Hygienic Zapper - Indoor Battery Powered Electric Trap
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: PROFESSIONAL-GRADE MOUSE TRAP - This electronic mouse trap tackles severe rodent infestations, providing a powerful indoor solution that kills over 100 mice per set of AA batteries (requires 4 x AA batteries, not included). It’s a quick, effective and humane way of controlling mice in the home

SECURE SAFE OPERATION - Safety first! This electronic mouse trap features an enclosed design and internal micro-switch, making it safe around children and pets. An LED indicator glows green when active while the semi-transparent lid provides easy verification of trapped rodents without contact

QUICK SETUP & HYGIENIC DISPOSAL - Simply insert the batteries, add the bait and switch it on. The rodent trap activates automatically with a humane high-voltage charge when the mouse enters. Experience hygienic cleanup without touching the rodent, just open the lid and dump the catch directly into the bin

EASY MAINTENANCE & REUSE - Maintain long-lasting effectiveness by disposing of caught rodents, cleaning the trap and rebaiting as necessary. To increase the catch rate, bait with The Big Cheese Mouse and Rat Attractant (STV163). Avoid using the electronic mouse zapper in damp or dusty environments

ULTRA POWER RODENT CONTROL - Our high-performance Ultra Power products from The Big Cheese will deliver effective results every time - just like the professionals use. As experts in rodent control for over 30 years, you can trust us to take care of your pest problems
description: From the manufacturer All-Weather Bait Block - 15 x 10g All-Weather Block Bait - 6 x 10g All-Weather Block Bait - 30 x 10g Ready-Baited Rat Trap Kit Rat and Mouse Bait Station Mouse and Rat Attractant - 26g Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 5,478 4.2 out of 5 stars 1,135 4.3 out of 5 stars 16,487 3.9 out of 5 stars 384 4.4 out of 5 stars 6,473 3.8 out of 5 stars 4,327 Description Ready-for-use bait blocks for the control of rats and mice indoors in the home or outdoors around buildings. Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. Ready-for-use bait blocks for the control of rats and mice indoors in the home or outdoors around buildings. Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. Ready-for-use bait blocks for the control of rats and mice indoors in the home or outdoors around buildings. Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. This rat trap kit effectively controls rodent infestations indoors and out. The kit is lockable and tamper-resistant, and it will keep captured rodents hidden from sight. Compact, tamper-resistant bait station with lockable lid to help protect children and pets from contact with bait (not included). Designed for use with all types of bait. Fresh 'n Tasty trap bait paste from The Big Cheese increases the catch rate in all types of rodent traps including snap and cage traps. Re-bait up to 60 traps.
